channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: You Can Now Sound the Alarm on AI Behaving Badly
item.description: Are you worried your AI chatbot is trying to build a bomb or leak personal information about you? There’s a website for that.

item.title: Fitness Bands in 2024: Which One Actually Fits Your Coding Lifestyle?
item.description: As developers, we're obsessed with data. We track GitHub commits, monitor API response times, and optimize every millisecond of runtime. So it's natural we'd want to do the same with our health....

item.title: A tiny image-editing AI now runs entirely inside your web browser
item.description: Moebius is a tiny AI model that does inpainting—erasing part of an image and filling the gap so seamlessly nothing seems missing—and it runs entirely in a web browser on your own device, with no...

item.title: Template de Avaliação de IAs de Coding
item.description: Resumo Executivo O que é este documento: um modelo padronizado para avaliar, de forma comparável e replicável, a capacidade real de ferramentas de IA aplicadas a desenvolvimento (Codex, Devin,...

item.title: Revolutionizing IPFS Publishing Speed: 10x Faster with Decentralized Optimization
item.description: Originally published on tamiz.pro. Introduction IPFS content publishing speed has historically lagged behind centralized systems due to its distributed architecture. Our team achieved a 10x...

item.title: I Built an AI App to End the "What Should We Watch?" Fight on Android TV
item.description: The 30-minute problem nobody talks about Every night it was the same ritual in my house. We'd sit down, turn on the TV, open one streaming app, scroll. Open another app, scroll. Read three plot...

item.title: ZFS unter Proxmox: Datasets, Snapshots & ARC‑Tuning für Produktion
item.description: Hook – Wenn Ihr Proxmox‑Cluster plötzlich Daten verliert, ist das kein "Feature", sondern ein Fatal Error Stellen Sie sich vor, Sie starten einen kritischen Unternehmensservice und das gesamte...

item.title: A security writeup catalogs how AI agents get attacked -- and one claim raised eyebrows
item.description: A semi-annual security roundup from DevFortress catalogs the real attack classes targeting AI agents, and also advances a dramatic, unverified claim that model weights can be extracted cheaply via...

item.title: Show HN: LIBR tracing with source ledger rows and byte-exact PDF verification
item.description: Article URL: https://exitprotocols.com/engineering/libr-state-machine/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48750737 Points: 3 # Comments: 1

item.title: What to Learn to Be a Graphics Programmer
item.description: Article URL: https://blog.demofox.org/2026/07/01/what-to-learn-to-be-a-graphics-programmer/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48750710 Points: 6 # Comments: 0

item.title: I Tried to Escape LeetCode for 2 Years (But Here We Are)
item.description: Seriously, LeetCode in 2026? Everyone is saying HackerRank just killed LeetCode, and yet here I am, still trying to debug my way through LeetCode problems. Well, I always wanted to smash LeetCode...

item.title: Cloudflare’s new policy pushes AI companies to pay for publishers’ content
item.description: Cloudflare is giving AI companies until September 15 to separate web crawlers used for search from those used for AI training and agents, or risk being blocked by default on many publisher sites.

item.title: Krafton settles with Subnautica 2 developer after drawn-out dispute over $250 million
item.description: After a lengthy legal dispute, Krafton has settled with its subsidiary Unknown Worlds Entertainment, which is developing Subnautica 2, and will pay bonuses to the studio's staff, Bloomberg...

item.title: Xbox testing disc-to-digital feature that digitizes a physical game collection
item.description: Microsoft will likely soon follow Sony and stop the production of physical discs for Xbox games. But instead of leaving physical discs behind entirely, sources familiar with Microsoft's plans tell...

item.title: My favorite Kindle alternative is $30 off after a recent price increase
item.description: Kobo recently raised the price of its Libra Colour e-reader to $259.99, but today’s deal effectively erases that hike. The company, Best Buy, and Target, are all selling it for its old $229.99...

item.title: Anthropic Added a New Security Measure to Get Back Into the Trump Administration’s Good Graces
item.description: The government has removed restrictions on Anthropic’s Fable 5 and Mythos 5 AI models—but there were strings attached.

item.title: New York City educators and industry leaders gathered at Google’s offices to shape the future of AI in classrooms.
item.description: Google, the New York Jobs CEO Council and Urban Assembly hosted an AI summit for 150 education and industry leaders.

item.title: Comcast’s split could make or break Peacock
item.description: NBCUniversal executives are about to find out whether Peacock will sink or swim in the streaming industry. Now that Comcast is planning to split NBCUniversal, Peacock, and Sky from its broadband...

item.title: Ousaban Banking Trojan Targets Iberian Bank Users with Fake PDF Lures
item.description: A Brazilian banking trojan called Ousaban is going after Windows users who bank in Spain and Portugal. Fortinet's FortiGuard Labs identified the campaign in May 2026. It opens with a phishing PDF...

item.title: Adobe Patches 7 CVSS 10.0 Flaws in ColdFusion and Campaign Classic
item.description: Adobe has released patches for multiple maximum-severity security flaws impacting Adobe ColdFusion and Adobe Campaign Classic. The ColdFusion updates "resolves critical and important...

item.title: The best Switch 2 case I’ve tried is cheaper than usual
item.description: Dbrand apparently knows how to really whiff a product launch, as we recently saw with the Steam Machine Companion Cube shell. But it also makes the best case out there for the Nintendo Switch 2,...

item.title: Sony is killing discs — and showing us why it’s a terrible idea
item.description: The future of video game preservation just took a major hit. This morning, Sony announced that, starting in January 2028, the company will no longer produce physical PlayStation discs, which means...

item.title: Critical Cursor Flaws Could Let Prompt Injection Escape Sandbox and Run Commands
item.description: Two flaws in Cursor, an AI code editor, could let a single, ordinary-looking prompt break out of the editor's safety sandbox and run any command on a developer's computer. There is no click to...

item.title: LLMs are stuck in a groupthink groove. This startup is trying to get them out.
item.description: Let’s start with a game. Open up your chatbot of choice—Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini—and type “Give me a random number between 1 and 10.” You’re going to get 7. Almost always. Now type “Another” and...

item.title: Venice AI becomes a unicorn with $65M Series A as its privacy-first AI platform takes off
item.description: Venice AI is already profitable, with annualized run-rate revenues of over $70 million, CEO Erik Voorhees said.

item.title: Gemini Spark, Google’s agentic assistant, is now available on Mac
item.description: Google's 24/7 agentic assistant, Gemini Spark, comes to Mac alongside other improvements, like real-time tracking and support for more apps.

item.title: Builders Stage agenda revealed: Practical strategies for scaling startups at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
item.description: The Builders Stage is returning to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026, bringing together 10,000+ founders, startup operators, and investors for practical conversations. and Q&A on what it takes to build and...

item.title: Progress Kemp LoadMaster Pre-Auth RCE Flaw Faces Active Exploitation Attempts
item.description: A recently disclosed critical security flaw impacting Progress Kemp LoadMaster is seeing active exploitation attempts, according to an advisory from eSentire's Threat Response Unit (TRU). The...

item.title: Meta, like SpaceX, looks to turn excess AI compute into cash
item.description: Meta is developing plans for a cloud infrastructure business, selling access to AI compute power and models. The move would pit it against the big cloud providers like Amazon Web Services, Google...

item.title: AI-Generated Browser Ransomware Abuses Chromium API on Windows and Android
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have flagged a new malware artifact generated using DeepSeek that constructed a novel attack path combining "unrealistic browser-malware concepts with a real browser...
